articles.title: Ripple might prove most of XRP sales were offshore; Then what?
articles.description: It would seem that no other day is complete without a major development in the ongoing case between Ripple Labs and the SEC. In what is the latest such update, the Court has approved Ripple’s request seeking help for getting XRP information from a list of cryptocurrency exchanges based offshore. The update was first revealed […]

articles.title: Dip-buyers anticipate further downside after Bitcoin price falls to $38K
articles.description: Sellers pressed Bitcoin's price back below $40,000, while analysts believe BTC will remain rangebound until the $42,000 level is breached.

articles.title: Coinbase Pro adds Shiba Inu, Chiliz and Keep, causing prices to spike
articles.description: Coinbase will add Shiba Inu, Chiliz and Keep Network to its professional trading platform with full trading beginning at 9am PT if liquidity conditions are met. The post Coinbase Pro adds Shiba Inu, Chiliz and Keep, causing prices to spike appeared first on Forkast.

articles.title: Coinbase Bump Alert – Four Altcoins Launching on Top Crypto Exchange
articles.description: Coinbase, the leading US crypto exchange, says traders are gaining access to several popular altcoins. The interoperable blockchain platform Polkadot (DOT) just debuted on Coinbase’s platform for professional traders, Coinbase Pro. The altcoin, which is the eighth largest by market cap at time of publishing, is not yet on the company’s retail trading outlet, Coinbase.com. […]

articles.description: A judge has denied the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission’s request for documents related to Ripple’s XRP transactions and lobbying efforts that took place after the SEC filed its lawsuit…

articles.title: Social Sentiment for $XRP, Cardano’s $ADA, and Other Large-Cap Altcoins Flashes Buy Signal
articles.description: Crypto insights platform Santiment says it’s tracking some key metrics indicating that it may be a good time to purchase XRP and four large-cap altcoins.
